parameters.query: SELECT c.id, c.complaintno, c.productname, c.producttype, c.vendorname, c.productlocation, c.natureofproblem, c.typeofcomplaint, c.tat, c.created, cs.storecode AS store_code, cs.storename AS store_name, cs.storecity AS city, cs.empname, cs.empmobileno, cs.empcode, cs.empdesignation, cs.managername, cs.managermobileno, cs.asmname, cs.asmmobileno, cs.fmname AS fm_name, cs.fmemail AS fm_email, cs.fmmobileno AS fm_mobile, ve.id AS escalation_id, ve.escalationlevel, ve.ticketno, ve.closuredate, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) AS days_overdue, cl.status AS current_status, cl.remarks AS last_remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id AND status = 'Not Connected') AS nc_count FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve ON ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id) LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND LOWER(c.producttype) NOT LIKE '%pest%' AND LOWER(c.productname) NOT LIKE '%pest%' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed', 'Resolved')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN ve.closuredate IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ve.closuredate ASC

parameters.jsCode:
const complaints = $input.all().map(i => ({
  id:              i.json.id,
  complaintno:     i.json.complaintno,
  productname:     i.json.productname,
  producttype:     i.json.producttype,
  vendorname:      i.json.vendorname,
  productlocation: i.json.productlocation,
  natureofproblem: typeof i.json.natureofproblem === 'object' ? Buffer.from(i.json.natureofproblem?.data || []).toString('utf8') : i.json.natureofproblem,
  typeofcomplaint: i.json.typeofcomplaint,
  tat:             i.json.tat,
  created:         i.json.created,
  store_code:      i.json.store_code,
  store_name:      i.json.store_name,
  city:            i.json.city,
  empname:         i.json.empname,
  empmobileno:     i.json.empmobileno,
  empcode:         i.json.empcode,
  empdesignation:  i.json.empdesignation,
  managername:     i.json.managername,
  managermobileno: i.json.managermobileno,
  asmname:         i.json.asmname,
  asmmobileno:     i.json.asmmobileno,
  fm_name:         i.json.fm_name,
  fm_email:        i.json.fm_email,
  fm_mobile:       i.json.fm_mobile,
  escalation_id:   i.json.escalation_id,
  escalationlevel: i.json.escalationlevel,
  ticketno:        i.json.ticketno,
  closuredate:     i.json.closuredate,
  days_overdue:    parseInt(i.json.days_overdue || 0),
  current_status:  i.json.current_status || 'Open',
  last_remark:     i.json.last_remark,
  nc_count:        parseInt(i.json.nc_count || 0),
}));

return [{ json: { success: true, count: complaints.length, complaints } }];
